Idioma.LB_PrimeroDebeSeleccionarUnCentroFuncion: First it should select a functional center
Idioma.AYUDA_EnEsteReporteSeMuestranLasMarcas: In this report the marks grouped are shown by: official, supervisor, functional center in short, grouped these according to the requests of the user, offers besides other details of the marks as: entrance authorized, exit authorized, overtime, etc...
